title: Principal Frontend Developer at Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Bengaluru operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates:
Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates!
